feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: incoming payment against a single order -Validation
entry.content:
Hi ,

Validation / check required: We should not be able to add an incoming payment of more than 1,99,500 in CASH against one sales order - whether this has been taken across multiple days or multiple times in the same day. The sum total of incoming cash type incoming payment against a single order must not exceed 1,99,500.

 

I tried to right this query but could not get the expected result 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
    IF @object_type = N'24' AND ( @transaction_type  IN ('A','U'))                                                              
 
BEGIN                                                                              
       if exists (SELECT t3.DocEntry   
        From ORCT t3
Inner Join RCT2 on RCT2.DocNum = t3.DocEntry
inner join ODPI T4 on RCT2.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry and T4.ObjType = RCT2.InvType
inner join DPI1 t5 on t5.DocEntry=t4.DocEntry
inner join RDR1 t7 on t7.DocEntry=t5.BaseEntry and t7.ObjType=t5.BaseType-- and t7.LineNum=t5.BaseLine
inner join ORDR t8 on t8.DocEntry=t7.DocEntry
   
   where t3.DocEntry =@list_of_cols_val_tab_del  and t3.CashSum>=199500  )                                    
      BEGIN                                                            
    SELECT @Error = 122                                      
     SELECT @error_message = 'cash cant receive more then 199500'                                                            
      END                                                              
END  
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Print Crystal PDF using Service Layer
entry.content:
I would like to print Crystal PDF using Service Layer.
Looking in the web, I came across this video/tutorial on how to ExportPDF using Service Layer. However, in my case, it didn’t work.
 
Trying to export through using Postman, the following errors were the responses to our requests:
"Unrecognized resource path." or "The requested URL was not found on this server."
 
I'm however able to Login and make Service Layer requests.

 

I followed the solution of this blog and I have SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA only but still not working.

Any help please 😥

entry.title: How to Access Questions Related to a specific tag on SAP community
entry.content:
Hi There,

How do I find all the questions that belong to a specific tag for example SAP Business One? In the past, I used to select SAP Business One tag and answer question simply, but now I can't find a way to have a look at all the open questions which belong to specific tags.

If you look at the below screenshot, it shows I am in SAP Business One but none of the questions on the screen have SAP Business One tag.

entry.title: Hana\Logs 99%
entry.content:
Hi All

How to solve when Hana/Logs 99% consumed?  User is not able to add new Warehouse.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: The system cannot find the file specified - BP
entry.content:
The system message pops out every time the user tries to find a BP. The find function is working, but the system message is interrupting their work. It is only happening to 1 user.

Can you please advise? Thank you.

entry.title: Calling a Bound Function in CAP against SAP-Business-One-Servicelayer
entry.content:
Hello,

I have prepared a Function in SAP-Business-One in order to get a Joined Sql-Result.
This function is callable via the Servicelayer.

The Idea is, to call this function via CAP, but this doesnt work in the moment.

I would appreciate to get any help. 

Problem-Description

Sql-Result via Service-Layer

https://192.168.206.146:50000/b1s/v2/SQLQueries('sql06')/List?docNum=1

Doku CAP

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/providing-services

Cds-Definition for bound function

Metadata-Definition

Service-Layer

CAP

Delegate the call

Cap-Url: http://localhost:4004/odata/v4/z/SqlQueriesXXX('sql04')/List()

entry.title: VENDOR BALANCE DIFFRENCES ISSUE
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
There is a difference in the Ledger Balance and Aging report in case of Foreign currency.
We have found the difference is because of the exchange rate. 
 
For example:
 
Invoice Booked at exchange rate 90 per $.
After 2 month, the exchange rate is 92 per $. Hence the amount is calculated based on the current exchange rate.
 
This is providing the wrong aging report. 
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley
SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Business One SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Business One 10.0 New Installation
entry.content:
Hi there.

We want to proceed with the update of our installation, both Server and SQL as a SAP 10.0 patch.

More or less the project is clear about what versions and how to do it, but I have a question related to the installation of the initial version 10.0.

In previous versions of Business One, there was always an installation version and then whatever was migrated to a patch... in version 10.0 I do not see that differentiation in downloads, except that some patches are Feature and others Support.
For example:
SAP BUSINESS ONE 10.0 Support Package - 2402
SAP BUSINESS ONE 10.0 Feature Package - 2308
The question is whether patch 2402 can be installed directly from scratch as if it were a new installation or do you have to start from a previous version, the only one I see is this one:

 

One last comment, in the installation version of version 9.0 (the so-called base or 0) could the sql server be executed unattended or silently, in version 10.0 do you know if it executes that installation or does it have to be installed manually?

Thanks for your comments.

entry.title: Service Layer Filter Does Not Work Correctly with Operator "and" "or"
entry.content:
3111211 - Service Layer Filter Does Not Work Correctly with Operator "and" "or"

This was meant to be fixed in 2202, but it's still an issue in 2402. Is anyone else facing this issue in 2402 as well?

entry.title: Assistance Needed: Issue with SAP B1 Version 10 Hana Invoice Series Display
entry.content:
Hello All Members,

My name is Rahul, and I am new to this community. I have one question: we are currently using SAP B1 Version 10 Hana. As you know, the new financial year has started, and we need to create new series for it.

My query is regarding my client, who has two sales invoice series: the first is 2324, and the second is 2425. Now, when the user creates a sales invoice using the new series, they encounter an issue where both series' data are displayed. For example, 2023 already posted the first number, and 2024 posted the new invoice. So, the user requires that when they select a particular series, like 2024 invoice number, and then click on previous or next record, only invoices from 2024 should be shown, not both series.

Does anyone have a solution or any customization for this? Please let me know. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Procedimiento de Autorización por Cantidad y Usuario en Orden de Compra
entry.content:
Hola a todos,

La razón por la que escribo es la siguiente:

Tengo una solicitud en la que se necesita que cuando una Orden de Compra se encuentre dentro del rango de monto de 0.00 a 10,000.00 genere el proceso de autorización a "UsuarioManagerA" y cuando el rango del monto sea de 10,000.01 a + genere el proceso de autorización a "UsuarioManagerB".

¿Alguna idea de como hacerlo?

entry.title: SAP B1 Cancel Asset Capitalization through DI-API
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am trying to cancel Asset Capitalization document through DI-API (VB.net)

Below are my code.

Dim oActivity As SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentService
oActivity = oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.ServiceTypes.AssetCapitalizationService)
'Dim oParam As SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentParams
Dim oParam = oActivity.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentServiceDataInterfaces.adsAssetDocumentParams)
oParam.Code = docno
oParam.CancellationOption = SAPbobsCOM.ClosingOptionEnum.coByOriginalDocumentDat
oActivity.Cancel(oParam)

 

I get the error at line Dim oParam = oActivity.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentServiceDataInterfaces.adsAssetDocumentParams)

 

Error saying Object reference not set to an instance of an object.

I think i am not calling the function correctly.

Please help me identify the issue.

 

Thanks in Advance.

Ibrahim

entry.title: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer, it is not registering DI API properly (SAP B1 v10 240)
entry.content: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer (SAP B1 v10 240), it is not registering DI API properly, therefore the reference is not available or visible in visual studio. Is anyone aware of a work-around for this issue?

entry.title: Can we delete the UDT/UDO log tables, if we untick logging for a UDO?
entry.content:
When we create a UDO, we have the option to create Log tables, when we untick this option, the log table stops logging, but the table is not deleted from the database. Can we delete the log table from the SAP B1 database?

We are using version 9.3 PL12 and also version 10 latest (240).

entry.title: Warning - Upgrading individual databases from v9.3 PL12 to v10 (1000.240.14) via the Setup Wizard
entry.content:
We were upgrading individual databases from v9.3 PL12 to v10 (1000.240.14) via the Setup Wizard.

Upgrade Wizard Precheck: Database structure check for SAP Business One indexes. When you run the SAP Business One upgrade wizard, during the upgrade precheck process, some manual changes to system indexes are detected. We are confirming the warning and upgrading the database, but we would like to understand why this is happening, since we haven't changed any table indexes. Looking at the log, we can see that most of the index mismatch tables are SAP table.

entry.title: Service Layer Load Balancer not behaving as expected by industry standards.
entry.content:
Any load balancer is logically expected to have a single end point. In SAP Business One v10 SQL (1000240), when we create Nodes, they load balance and remain on the same server. But when we create a load balancer on another machine, we end up with two different end points which a developer needs to connect to. This is not how a load balancer works ideally, a developer should have a single end point regardless of how the load is balanced.

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  • Install Service Layer for SAP B1 v10 in one server
  • Install Service Layer Component for SAP B1 v10 on another server
  • You will now have two different IP addresses and logins for the service layer
  • A load balancer should automatically balance the load, without developers worrying about when to connect to which machine

entry.title: Has anyone tried posting Journals in batch?
entry.content:
I remember, when posting things in batch via BPA ETL tool, I managed to improve performance when posting things in batch. Not sure if anyone has worked out how to do this via DI-API?

We are trying to post millions of journals (14 million) in one SAP B1 database, so every second counts.

entry.title: Is it possible to configure the min and max memory allocation property for the Apache server?
entry.content: It is my understanding that Service Layer is using Apache server in the background. I am unable to find performance optimization and tuning settings for setting min and max memory for the Apache server. Is this configurable for each node or at a server level at all? If so, has anyone found a link to a tech note or some documentation on this at all?

entry.title: BOM and Standard Cost
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently undergoing a big project which requires a query to display a BOM and its contents in the aim of a predictive std cost report. some of the fields i have left as NULL as this is down to manual input but whilst the query works to a degree i am unable to see when in BOMS another BOM has been used as a component:
this is my logic:

WITH ComponentPrices AS (
SELECT
T0.Father AS ParentItem,
T0.Code AS Component,
T0.Quantity,
T0.Price AS ComponentPrice,
T1.LstEvlPric AS STDComponentPrice,
T0.Quantity * T0.Price AS ComponentTotalPrice,
T0.Quantity * T1.LstEvlPric AS STDComponentTotalPrice
FROM ITT1 T0
INNER JOIN OITM T1 ON T0.Code = T1.ItemCode
WHERE T1.QryGroup6 = 'Y'
)

SELECT
T0.Father AS "PARENT PRODUCT CODE",
T0.VisOrder AS "Line Level",
T0.Code AS "PRODUCT COMPONENT",
T1.ItemName AS "COMPONENT DESCRIPTION",
T0.Quantity AS "QTY",
T0.Currency,
T0.Price AS "UNIT COST",
T0.Quantity * T0.Price AS "TOTAL COST",
T2.CardName AS "SUPPLIER",
T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.01 AS "HANDLING 1% (TBC)", -- Holding Charge - 1% of stock Price
T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.02 AS "CUSTOM 2% (TBC)",
'1.5' AS "TRANSPORT COST (%)",
T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.015 AS "TRANS COST (TBC)",
NULL AS "FLIGHT RISK(%)",
SUM(T0.Quantity * T1.LstEvlPric) * (SELECT TOP 1 Rate FROM ORTT WHERE Currency = 'EUR' AND RateDate <= CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE()) ORDER BY RateDate DESC) AS "STD 2024 IN €",
(SUM(T0.Quantity * T0.Price) + (T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.01) + (T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.02) + (T0.Quantity * T0.Price * 0.015)) AS "STD 2024 IN GBP",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN €",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN GBP",
NULL AS "DIFF **bleep** 24/23",
NULL AS "DIFF. % 24/23",
NULL AS "LIST",
'GBP' AS "CURRENCY",
NULL AS "LIST IN EURO",
NULL AS "COST EURO (X QNT)",
NULL AS "NOTE",
NULL AS "CODICE PRODOTTO",
NULL AS "TOTALE 2020 EURO"
FROM ITT1 T0
INNER JOIN OITM T1 ON T0.Code = T1.ItemCode
INNER JOIN OCRD T2 ON T1.CardCode = T2.CardCode
WHERE T1.QryGroup6 = 'Y'
GROUP BY T0.Father, T0.VisOrder, T0.Code, T1.ItemName, T0.Quantity, T0.Currency, T1.LstEvlPric, T2.CardName,T0.Price

UNION ALL

SELECT
ParentItem AS "PARENT PRODUCT CODE",
NULL AS "Line Level",
NULL AS "PRODUCT COMPONENT",
NULL AS "COMPONENT DESCRIPTION",
NULL AS "QTY",
NULL AS Currency,
MAX(ComponentPrice) AS "UNIT COST",
SUM(ComponentTotalPrice) AS "TOTAL COST",
NULL AS "SUPPLIER",
NULL AS "HDLN",
NULL AS "CUSTOM%",
NULL AS "TRASP. FOB (%)",
NULL AS "TRASP. FOB (euro)",
NULL AS "FLIGHT RISK(%)",
NULL AS "STD 2024 IN €",
NULL AS "STD 2024 IN GBP",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN €",
NULL AS "STD 2023 IN GBP",
NULL AS "DIFF **bleep** 24/23",
NULL AS "DIFF. % 24/23",
NULL AS "LIST",
'GBP' AS "CURRENCY",
NULL AS "LIST IN EURO",
NULL AS "COST EURO (X QNT)",
NULL AS "NOTE",
NULL AS "CODICE PRODOTTO",
NULL AS "TOTALE 2020 EURO"
FROM ComponentPrices
GROUP BY ParentItem

ORDER BY "PARENT PRODUCT CODE", "Line Level"

 

Any assistance would be greatly appreciated.

 

Best wishes

Brad

entry.title: fecha de documento posterior oferta de ventas
entry.content:
Buenas tardes, en el modulo de oferta de ventas me arroja el siguiente mensaje "FOTO" al momento de hacer la creación del documento, he estado viendo algunos post y me arrojan la siguiente solucion Se trata de la parametrización ubicada en Gestión --> Inicialización de Sistema --> Parametriaciones de documento --> Ficha General...

 

MUCHAS GRACIAS. Saludos.
